name: DST_123_01_İNDİRİLECEKKDVLİSTESİ
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[DST_123_01_İNDİRİLECEKKDVLİSTESİ]
AS


SELECT   

INVOICE.DATE_ AS [FATURA TARİHİ], 
INVOICE.FICHENO AS FATURA_NO,
INVOICE.DOCODE AS BELGE_NO,
CLCARD.CODE 'CARİ KODU',
CLCARD.DEFINITION_ AS [CARİ ÜNVANI], 
CLCARD.TAXNR 'VERGİ KİMLİK NO',
       CASE STLINE.LINETYPE WHEN 0 THEN 'Stok' WHEN 4 THEN 'Hizmet' ELSE 'DİGER' END 'TİPİ', CASE WHEN STLINE.TRCODE IN (1, 3) 
                      THEN CASE WHEN STLINE.LINETYPE IN (0) 
                      THEN ITEMS.CODE ELSE SRVCARD.CODE END ELSE CASE WHEN STLINE.LINETYPE = 4 THEN SRVCARD.CODE ELSE ITEMS.CODE END END 'STOK KODU', 
                      CASE WHEN STLINE.TRCODE IN (1, 3) THEN CASE WHEN STLINE.LINETYPE IN (0) 
                      THEN ITEMS.NAME ELSE SRVCARD.DEFINITION_ END ELSE CASE WHEN STLINE.LINETYPE = 4 THEN SRVCARD.DEFINITION_ ELSE ITEMS.NAME END END 'STOK AÇIKLAMASI',





--STFICHE.FICHENO AS [İRSALİYE NO],



                       
       --               STLINE.DATE_ AS [İŞLEM TARİHİ], 
                                   --YEAR(STLINE.DATE_) [YIL],
                                   --MONTH(STLINE.DATE_) [AY],
                                   --CASE DATEPART(MONTH, STLINE.DATE_) 
       --               WHEN 1 THEN 'OCAK' WHEN 2 THEN 'ŞUBAT' WHEN 3 THEN 'MART' WHEN 4 THEN 'NİSAN' WHEN 5 THEN 'MAYIS' WHEN 6 THEN 'HAZİRAN' WHEN 7 THEN 'TEMMUZ'
       --                WHEN 8 THEN 'AĞUSTOS' WHEN 9 THEN 'EYLÜL' WHEN 10 THEN 'EKİM' WHEN 11 THEN 'KASIM' WHEN 12 THEN 'ARALIK' END AS [İŞLEM AYI], 
                                    CASE STLINE.TRCODE WHEN 1 THEN 'Alım Faturası'WHEN 3 THEN 'Satış iade İrsaliyesi'WHEN 4 THEN 'Alınan Hizmet' WHEN 13 THEN 'Üretimden Giriş Fişi' WHEN 50 THEN 'Sayım Fazlası Fişi'WHEN 25 THEN 'Ambar Fişi'WHEN 14 THEN 'Devir Fişi'ELSE 'DİĞER'END AS TÜR,
                       STLINE.AMOUNT AS [MİKTAR],
                                   
                                    (SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_UNITSETL WHERE LOGICALREF=STLINE.UOMREF) BIRIM,
                                   --STLINE.PRICE AS [BİRİM FİYAT],
                                 
                                   CASE STLINE.TRCODE WHEN 1 THEN VATMATRAH WHEN 4 THEN VATMATRAH ELSE VATMATRAH *  1 END +STLINE.DISTEXP AS KDVMATRAHI,
                                   STLINE.VATAMNT AS [KDVTUTARI],
                                   --CASE STLINE.TRCODE WHEN 1 THEN VATMATRAH WHEN 4 THEN VATMATRAH ELSE VATMATRAH *  1 END+STLINE.VATAMNT+STLINE.DISTEXP AS [NET TUTAR],
                                   --STLINE.TOTAL AS İNDİRİMSİZTUTAR,CASE WHEN STLINE.TRCODE IN (2, 3) THEN STLINE.DISTDISC * - 1 ELSE STLINE.DISTDISC END AS İSKONTO,
                                 STLINE.VAT ,
                                   
                      --CASE STLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL'WHEN 1 THEN 'USD'WHEN 20 THEN 'EURO' ELSE '' END AS İDTÜRÜ, 
                      --CASE STLINE.TRRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE STLINE.PRICE / STLINE.TRRATE END AS İDBİRİMFİYATI, 
                      --CASE STLINE.TRRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE STLINE.VAT / STLINE.TRRATE END AS İDKDV, 
                      --CASE STLINE.TRRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE STLINE.TOTAL / STLINE.TRRATE END AS İDTUTAR,
                      -- PYP.DEFINITION_ AS VADE,
                                    CASE STLINE.BILLED WHEN 1 THEN 'FATURALANDI' WHEN 0 THEN 'İRSALİYE' ELSE 'DİĞER' END [FATURALANMA DURUMU]
                                    --,STLINE.SOURCEINDEX [AMBAR NO]
                                   --,CASE STLINE.SOURCEINDEX WHEN 0 THEN 'MERKEZ' WHEN 2 THEN 'IGA'  WHEN 4 THEN 'ORHANLI' WHEN 6 THEN 'ESKİŞEHİR' WHEN 8 THEN 'MANİSA' 
                                   --WHEN 10 THEN 'GÖLCÜK' WHEN 1 THEN 'MERKEZ SERVİS' WHEN 3 THEN 'IGA SERVİS'WHEN 5 THEN 'ORHANLI SERVİS'WHEN 7 THEN 'ESKİŞEHİR SERVİS'
                                   --WHEN 9 THEN 'MANİSA SERVİS'WHEN 5 THEN 'ORHANLI SERVİS'
                                   -- ELSE 'BOS'END[AMBAR]
                                    
                                    --,EMC.CODE [MM KODU],
                                 --EMC.DEFINITION_ [MM ADI],EMC.SPECODE [ÖZEL KOD],EMC.CYPHCODE [MODEL],EMC.SPECODE2 [MODEL YILI],EMC.SPECODE3 [PARK ALANI],
                                   --PROJ.NAME [PROJE KODU],
                                        ,  (SELECT        FICHENO
                               FROM            LG_123_01_EMFICHE
                               WHERE        LOGICALREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_123_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = INVOICE.LOGICALREF)) [MUH FİŞ NO],

----------------------------------------------


                                                ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_123_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_123_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = INVOICE.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '19%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],
															   -------------
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_123_EMUHACC WHERE LOGICALREF IN (
															   
                                                ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTREF

                               FROM            LG_123_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_123_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = INVOICE.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '19%'),''))) [MUHASEBE FİŞİ KDV ADI],



															   -------------------

ISNULL(  (SELECT       SUM( DEBIT )

                               FROM            LG_123_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_123_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = INVOICE.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '191.00.0000%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ KDV TOPLAMI],
															   
ISNULL(  (SELECT       SUM( DEBIT )

                               FROM            LG_123_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_123_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = INVOICE.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '19%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ KDV TOPLAMI_ESKI]




                                                                                                      --SUBSTRING(EMU.CODE, 1, 15) [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]
                                 
                                   
FROM         dbo.LG_123_01_STLINE AS STLINE LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_ITEMS AS ITEMS ON STLINE.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_SRVCARD AS SRVCARD ON STLINE.STOCKREF = SRVCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_CLCARD AS CLCARD ON STLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_01_INVOICE AS INVOICE ON INVOICE.LOGICALREF = STLINE.INVOICEREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_PAYPLANS AS PYP ON PYP.LOGICALREF = CLCARD.PAYMENTREF LEFT JOIN
                                   ---dbo.LG_123_EMCENTER AS EMC ON EMC.LOGICALREF=STLINE.CENTERREF LEFT JOIN
                                   --dbo.lg_123_PROJECT AS PROJ ON PROJ.LOGICALREF=STLINE.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN
                                    LG_123_UNITSETF AS UNT ON UNT.LOGICALREF=ITEMS.UNITSETREF LEFT JOIN 
                                   --dbo.LG_123_01_STFICHE AS STFICHE ON STFICHE.LOGICALREF = STLINE.STFICHEREF LEFT JOIN
                                   TIGER3.DBO.L_CAPIWHOUSE CAPI ON CAPI.NR=STLINE.SOURCEINDEX AND CAPI.FIRMNR=123 
                                   LEFT JOIN LG_123_EMUHACC EMU ON EMU.LOGICALREF = STLINE.ACCOUNTREF
WHERE     (STLINE.TRCODE IN (4,1))  AND (STLINE.CANCELLED = 0) AND (STLINE.LINETYPE IN (4,0)) and STLINE.BILLED=1
--AND DOCODE='TEF2023000000023'
---(STLINE.DATE_ BETWEEN '20200101' AND '21001231')
--OR (ITEMS.CODE  NOT LIKE '260%'AND ITEMS.CODE  NOT LIKE '252%'AND ITEMS.CODE  NOT LIKE '254%'AND ITEMS.CODE  NOT LIKE '255%'AND ITEMS.CODE  NOT LIKE '264%')

sample_data.CARİ ÜNVANI: SNC BİLGİ TEKNOLOJİLERİ TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
LOGO YAZILIM SANAYİ VE TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
LOGO YAZILIM SANAYİ VE TİCARET ANONİM ŞİRKETİ

MARSH SİGORTA VE REASÜRANS BROKERLİĞİ A.Ş.
MARSH SİGORTA VE REASÜRANS BROKERLİĞİ A.Ş.
